reinforced_interaction_patterns: Repeated interaction history is sufficient to propose a bounded persona delta.
User prefers persona evolution to remain governed, auditable, and constrained.
User prefers theory to be connected to concrete implementation steps.
User treats Ledger records as the source of experiential memory.
observed_failure_patterns: Current architecture may record experience without yet applying experience-derived persona updates.
Persona evolution requires drift detection to distinguish valid adaptation from identity erosion.

governance.reason: Assessment approves only bounded engram-style updates. Application requires a separate apply step.
